summary: Implement support for Stripe ACH direct debit payment method (F4).
description: Tenant 'Alpha Solutions' requested the addition of Stripe ACH direct debit as a payment option to comply with their new financial standards. This requires frontend and backend integration with the Stripe API.
resolution_details: Completed integration of the Stripe ACH API. Added new endpoints for payment source creation and updated the payment retry logic to handle ACH delays. Requires a minor Helm chart update for new secrets.
release_notes_excerpt: New Feature: Added support for Stripe ACH direct debit, providing a new, secure payment option for our customers.
